message:
refactor(main): continue tokio::test → run_async_test migration for remaining robot_approve tests

Migrate the remaining batch of robot_approve async tests from
#[tokio::test] to the panic-safe run_async_test() wrapper introduced
in 0272aba2. This completes the migration for the approval token
evaluation test suite, ensuring all async tests use proper runtime
cleanup and isolation.

Tests migrated: robot_approve_wrong_pane, robot_approve_wrong_workspace,
and related approval flow tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
